task_completion.description: Open the specified animation file in OpenToonz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenToonz application is visible with 'dwanko_run' displayed in the window title, scene browser, or xsheet/timeline.

task_completion.description: Modify the main animation column's opacity to approximately 50%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Xsheet or Timeline, the opacity/transparency slider or numerical value for the main animation column is set to approximately 50% (or around 127 if the scale is 0-255).

task_completion.description: Set the output format to PNG with Alpha Channel enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings dialog is visible, with the file format set to 'png' and the Alpha channel enabled (often denoted as 'RGBM', 'RGBA', or an 'Alpha' checkbox in the format options).

task_completion.description: Set the output directory to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings dialog shows the 'Save In' or output path set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/ghost_render/'.

task_completion.description: Render at least 24 frames of the animation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A render progress window showing frames being rendered (indicating at least 24 frames), or a file manager window showing a sequence of PNG files inside the 'ghost_render' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with OpenToonz menus, dialogs, and panels rather than terminal commands executing scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the project file directly using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) are seen open with the .tnz XML data being manually modified.

integrity.description: The render process was genuinely executed within OpenToonz.
integrity.visual_evidence: The render progress bar or OpenToonz interface is actively shown during the output generation, rather than files being copied from elsewhere.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source scene is '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. The target output directory is '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/ghost_render/'. The agent must render at least 24 frames. The opacity should be set to approximately 50% (which may appear as ~127 on a 0-255 scale). The output format must be PNG with Alpha channel enabled.
